title: Homecare - Shiny Sinks Cream Sink Cleaner - 290ml
features: Homecare Shiny Sinks revives, renews, and restores
Prevents Limescale build up Formulated to remove tough dirt, stains, soap scum and hardwater marks
Shiny sinks is suitable for use on stainless steel sinks, acrylic baths, chrome, copper and brass
For brushed surfaces use in direction of brushed lines
Used regularly Shiny Sinks will prevent limescale build-up
description: Product Description Shiny sinks is specially formulated to remove tough dirt, soap scum, stains and hard water marks from stainless steel sinks. Shiny sinks can also be used on acrylic baths, chrome, copper and brass to bring back original lustre. Used regularly shiny sinks will prevent limescale. Ingredients Less than 30% Inert Mineral Filler, Less than 5% Non-Ionic Surfactant, Food Grade Acid, Flowing Agent, Natural Gum, Preservative, Less than 1% Fragrance, Water to Balance.
